Event: The New Fairy Adventure
Event Date: 01/03/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: E5
Smashing Shot Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, shoots an ice arrow at a random enemy. Ice arrow deals 73000 / 77100 / 82500 / 89900 / 101500 / 125000 / 160000 magic damage and reduces the attack speed by 13% / 14% / 15% / 16% / 18% / 20% / 23% for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 2
3000 Damage from the gems
Once in a while, shoots an ice arrow at 2 random enemies. Ice arrow deals 87600 / 92600 / 99000 / 107900 / 121800 / 150000 / 190000 magic damage and reduces the attack speed by 13% / 14% / 15% / 16% / 18% / 20% / 23% for 3 sec. On hit, it also reduces the target's healing by 18% / 19% / 20% / 22% / 24% / 30% / 38% for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 3
6000 Damage from the gems
Once in a while, shoots an ice arrow at 3 random enemies. Ice arrow deals 102200 / 180000 / 115500 / 125900 / 142100 / 175000 / 215000 magic damage and freezes the target for 3 sec. During this time, the frozen unit can't move or attack. It also increases the cooldown of the target's gear and artifact abilities by 3 sec
